title: Speech and Language Therapy Mission and Vision
content:
Speech and Language Therapy Mission and Vision

Vision

To be a leading and sought-after program in Turkey to train speech and language therapists trained for clinical, research and leadership roles, ready to work successfully with culturally and/or linguistically diverse individuals.

Mission

Üsküdar University Speech and Language Therapy Undergraduate Program is organized by expert speech and language therapists who help students acquire the necessary equipment and experience with preparatory courses conducted by competent instructors, in order to ensure that candidates participate in the profession as knowledgeable and basic skills. to train internationally accredited speech and language therapists; To train qualified professionals in the field of speech and language disorders and therapy in order to meet the short and long term needs of the country.
